stimulus:
Welcome! This study will last ~30 minutes. After the instructions there will be a practice game and quiz to make sure you understand the task. Today you will be the head captain of a pirate ship traveling around the world to different islands. Here is an overview of what you will be doing:


1. Try to find the most successful pirate on 6 different islands

2. Recall which pirates did the best on each island
